positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration featuring a majestic owl perched on a crescent moon, surrounded by intricate, glowing floral vines and constellations. The owl should have a powerful silhouette and deep, defined plumage. Use a neo-tribal, symmetrical design aesthetic with elements of Art Nouveau and dark cosmic fantasy. The color palette must feature deep midnight blues, rich purples, ethereal teal, and glowing gold accents. The composition should be centralized and highly detailed, designed to look excellent on a garment. The moonlight should cast strong, dramatic contrast, giving the image a magical, mystical glow. Clean lines, perfect for print.
negative: text, words, logo, watermark, signature, blurry, out of focus, noisy, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low quality, grain, photo, photo-realistic
